compiled_state.title: Write RED test: implementation-plan SKILL.md Context File Check backward compatibility with researchFindings
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
eaa2-ca1c — PREPLANNING_CONTEXT research compounding across pipeline

## Goal
Write a failing (RED) structural boundary test that validates implementation-plan SKILL.md's Context File Check gracefully handles PREPLANNING_CONTEXT payloads with or without the researchFindings field.

## Test File
tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-research-findings-compat.sh

## Test Cases (≥3 required)
1. **test_impl_plan_context_check_handles_missing_research_findings** — implementation-plan SKILL.md Context File Check section describes handling PREPLANNING_CONTEXT with or without the researchFindings field (structural boundary: "researchFindings" mentioned in Context File Check section)
2. **test_impl_plan_context_check_fail_open** — implementation-plan SKILL.md Context File Check describes fail-open behavior when field is absent (backward compat with old contexts)
3. **test_impl_plan_context_check_schema_version_aware** — implementation-plan SKILL.md describes schema_version awareness in Context File Check (forward compat)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Test file exists and is executable
- All test cases FAIL before implementation (RED)
- All test cases PASS after implementation (GREEN)
- Follows behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5

## .test-index
After creating this file, add entry to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md → tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-research-findings-compat.sh [test_impl_plan_context_check_handles_missing_research_findings]

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-research-findings-compat.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE — add RED marker for implementation-plan/SKILL.md)
